symptom_en: Interveinal chlorosis on young to middle leaves

zone_correlation.note: High state-wide Zn deficiency prevalence; strongest concern in Zone 5 benchmark areas.

field_checks: Confirm veins remain relatively greener than interveinal area.
Check new flush leaves for small size and rosetting.

zone_correlation.note: Common in low organic matter dry zones and continuous cereal systems.

field_checks: Observe whether yellowing starts at lower canopy.
Check stunting and reduced tillering/branching.

symptom_en: Youngest leaves become pale yellow or almost white

zone_correlation.note: More likely in alkaline/calcareous pockets and high pH irrigation regimes.

field_checks: Check whether younger leaves are affected more than older leaves.
Assess soil pH trend if available.

symptom_en: Dark green leaves with purple underside
symptom_kn: ಎಲೆಗಳು ಕಡು ಹಸಿರು ಮತ್ತು ಕೆಳಭಾಗ ನೇರಳೆ ಬಣ್ಣ

zone_correlation.note: Frequent in acidic red/lateritic soils where P fixation is high.

field_checks: Look for stunted plants with delayed maturity.
Confirm purple tint on petiole/leaf underside.

symptom_en: Leaf edge scorching or marginal burn

zone_correlation.note: Seen in high rainfall zones with leaching-prone soils.

field_checks: Check burn progression from margins inward.
Observe weak stem strength and lodging tendency.

symptom_kn: ಗಿಡದ ಬೆಳವಣಿಗೆ ಕುಂಠಿತವಾಗಿ ಗುಂಟು ಅಂತರ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗುವುದು

zone_correlation.note: Likely where OM is low and micronutrient imbalance persists.

field_checks: Assess rosette-like new growth.
Compare affected plants with healthy patch in same field.

zone_correlation.note: Common where soil compaction and low microbial activity reduce root function.

field_checks: Inspect root health and odor.
Check for hardpan or crusting in root zone.

zone_correlation.note: More frequent under prolonged leaf wetness and dense canopy.

field_checks: Check if lesions expand concentrically.
Inspect neighboring plants for spread pattern.

symptom_en: Mosaic or mottled light-dark green leaf pattern
symptom_kn: ಎಲೆಯ ಮೇಲೆ ತೆಳು-ಗಾಢ ಹಸಿರು ಮೋಸೈಕ್ ಮಾದರಿ

zone_correlation.note: Associated with vector pressure and weak crop immunity in dry belts.

field_checks: Check for curling and reduced leaf size.
Inspect aphid/whitefly incidence.

symptom_en: Poor root growth, brown-black root tips
symptom_kn: ಬೇರು ಬೆಳವಣಿಗೆ ಕಡಿಮೆ, ಬೇರು ತುದಿ ಕಂದು-ಕಪ್ಪಾಗುವುದು

zone_correlation.note: Seen where root-zone stress, salinity, or poor microbial activity exists.

field_checks: Uproot sample plants and inspect fine roots.
Check drainage and salt crust signs.

symptom_en: Delayed flowering and poor fruit set

zone_correlation.note: Boron deficiency is repeatedly observed in dry red and mixed soils.

field_checks: Check flower drop frequency.
Observe malformed flowers or brittle petals.

zone_correlation.note: More likely in fast-growing vegetable systems with uneven moisture.

field_checks: Look for deformed growing points.
Check newly emerged leaves for brittleness.

symptom_en: Leaf tip burn on newly emerged leaves

zone_correlation.note: Observed in high rainfall horticulture belts with nutrient imbalance.

field_checks: Inspect youngest leaves and meristem region.
Check for uneven irrigation patterns.

symptom_en: General chlorosis with thin weak stems
symptom_kn: ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಹಳದಿ ಬಣ್ಣ ಮತ್ತು ದುರ್ಬಲ ಕಾಂಡ

zone_correlation.note: Sulphur deficiency is frequent in low-OM rainfed drylands.

field_checks: Compare yellowing pattern in young vs old leaves.
Assess stem thickness and vigor.

symptom_en: Patchy field yellowing in circular clusters

zone_correlation.note: Common in paddy and mixed systems where BPH or localized soil stress occurs.

field_checks: Inspect lower canopy for planthoppers or sap suckers.
Check whether patches expand rapidly over days.
